summary: Stunning two‑night stand with scorching Jack Straw, Scarlet Begonias/Fire on the Mountain and a bonkers Sugar Magnolia, wrapped up by a perfect The Weight.
review: The reviewers rave about this show, calling it an amazing two‑night stand where Jack Straw, Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain and Sugar Magnolia are delivered at peak inspiration. Jerry’s interplay with Bruce Hornsby is highlighted as “ridiculous,” and the set closes with a flawless rendition of The Weight. No specific recording‑quality comments were made, but the performance alone makes it highly recommended.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the musical performance heavily; recording quality is not addressed, so rating reflects strong show quality with uncertain technical merit.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard or audience issues; listeners focus on the performance, implying a listenable but undocumented source.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Two‑night stand flows beautifully, with strong transitions especially between Jack Straw, Scarlet Begonias/Fire and Sugar Magnolia, culminating in a perfect The Weight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his amazing interplay with Bruce Hornsby, described as ‘ridiculous’.
band_member_comments.Keys: Bruce Hornsby’s keyboard work is highlighted as outstanding alongside Jerry.
